task_description: Implement token-by-token streaming for AI chat responses over WebSocket. Stream Gemini responses as they generate instead of waiting for full completion, making the UX feel instant.

verification.summary: pnpm lint passes. pnpm build succeeds. pytest passes 36/36 on test_websocket.py + test_agents.py. Review fixes applied: asyncio.Queue for true incremental streaming, per-request callback via task dict (no singleton race), ghost message fallback when no chunks sent, dead generate_stream() removed.
